# playUsingSceneTimeBase

**Type Property**

Animations loaded from the scene file are immediately added to the scene and played according to the scene’s [doc://com.apple.scenekit/documentation/SceneKit/SCNSceneRenderer/sceneTime] property.

## Declaration

```swift
static let playUsingSceneTimeBase: SCNSceneSource.AnimationImportPolicy
```

## Discussion

Using this policy is equivalent to manually loading each animation, setting its [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/QuartzCore/CAAnimation/usesSceneTimeBase] property to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true], and adding it to the appropriate element of the scene. Use this policy when you want to directly control (or let the user directly control) the progress of animations.

## Type Properties

- **doNotPlay**: Animations are not loaded from the scene file.
- **play**: Animations loaded from the scene file are immediately added to the scene and played once.
- **playRepeatedly**: Animations loaded from the scene file are immediately added to the scene and played repeatedly.
